sections.paragraph:
προκοπή, ῆς, ἡ (Polyb.+; Bion in Diog. L. 4, 50; Posidonius in Diog. L. 7, 91; Diod S 16, 6, 3; Epict. [index Sch.]; OGI 627, 2; PRyl 233, 16; PGiss 27, 7; PMert 24, 9f; Sir 51:17; 2 Macc 8:8; EpArist 242; Philo; Jos., Ant. 4, 59; Test12Patr; loanw. in rabb. Rejected by Atticists: Phryn. p. 85 Lob.; Theoph. Ant. 2, 24 [p. 158, 16]) a movement forward to an improved state, progress, advancement, furtherance Phil 1:25; 1 Ti 4:15. εἰς πρ. τινος ἔρχεσθαι help to advance someth. Phil 1:12.—New Docs 4, 36. DELG s.v. κόπτω. M-M. TW. Spicq. Sv.

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PRyl PRyl = Catalogue of the Greek Papyri in the John Rylands Library—List 4

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

PMert PMert = A Descriptive Catalogue of the Greek Papyri in the Collection of Wilford Merton—List 4

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

Phryn Phryn , the Atticist, signifying his Eclogae, II a.d.—List 5

Lob. Lob. = CLobeck, s. Phryn.—List 5

Theoph. Ant. Theoph. Ant. = Theophilus Antiochenus, II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 871
